typography.instructions: Use Geist for primary UI. If Geist is not available, default to Inter as requested by user. Use mono fonts for asset codes, dates, and technical details to add a premium technical feel.

colors.instructions: Strictly follow the user's mandatory palette. Set these exact HEX codes as CSS variables in index.css. Do NOT use gradients of primary/secondary colors. Use secondary (#92BA3C) strictly for active states, 'POSISI SEKARANG' badges, and success accents. Use Primary (#01567A) for branding, sidebar, and primary CTA buttons.

layouts.general: Light gray background (#F8FAFC), container max-width, generous whitespace (p-6, p-8), tidy grid system.
layouts.cards: Cards must have a white background, soft ambient shadow (`shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]`), rounded-xl radius, and thin borders (#E5E7EB).
layouts.timeline_page: Grid layout on Asset Detail: Left column (Asset Info, Current Location, Move Form) taking 4 spans or 1/3 width, Right column (Timeline History) taking 8 spans or 2/3 width. Timeline is the absolute focus.

timeline.implementation: Custom Tailwind component. Vertical left border line. Circle nodes overlapping the line. Use a secondary color (#92BA3C) filled circle for the most recent/current node. Cards extending from nodes. Date on top of card or left inline. 'POSISI SEKARANG' (Current Position) badge on the latest node.
timeline.instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use a generic library. Build a custom Framer Motion enabled vertical timeline component with Tailwind. Use a relative container with a vertical absolute line (`bg-[#E5E7EB]`). Overlay circular nodes on the line. The current active node should have #92BA3C.

data_table.implementation: Shadcn UI table. Clean, thin horizontal borders only. No vertical borders. Generous padding (`py-3`). Highlight row on hover (`hover:bg-gray-50`). Sticky header if possible. Add pagination at the bottom.

buttons.implementation: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (`rounded-md` or `rounded-lg`). Primary buttons use #01567A background, white text. Secondary use white background, #E5E7EB border, #1F2937 text. Include Lucide icons in buttons.

forms.implementation: Labels with `text-sm font-medium`. Inputs with `border-[#E5E7EB]`, `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#01567A]/20 focus:border-[#01567A]`. Use Shadcn Select with search capabilities for office/room movement.

motion.rules: Use Framer Motion. Page transitions: fade in and slide up slightly (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`). Staggered children for lists/timeline nodes. Micro-interactions on buttons/hover states.
motion.skeletons: Use subtle pulsing skeletons matching the layout for loading states. Color: `bg-gray-200 animate-pulse rounded-md`.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure contrast compliance. White text on Primary (#01567A) works well.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons at 16px to 20px size. Keep stroke width consistent (1.5 or 2).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions. Use Shadcn components for Selects, Dialogs, etc.
Never use generic centered layouts. Use grid, bento box styles, or structured columns.
Do not apply `transition: all`. Target specific properties.
All toasts must use the `sonner` package.
Asset Detail Timeline must be heavily stylized as GitHub/Linear style. Do NOT just output a basic bulleted list.
Inject framer-motion into Shadcn cards and standard layout divs to give a premium feel.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update `/app/frontend/src/index.css` to map the user's exact HEX codes to Tailwind variables.
2. Ensure `lucide-react`, `framer-motion`, `sonner`, and relevant Shadcn components are installed and integrated.
3. Build Sidebar Navigation for Dashboard, Assets, Offices, and Rooms.
4. Build the Dashboard page with a data table containing search, filters, and pagination.
5. Build the Asset Detail page with breadcrumbs, Info Card, Location Card, Move Asset Form (using Selects and Confirmation Dialog), and the main GitHub-style Timeline.
6. Build CRUD interfaces (tables/forms) for Offices and Rooms.
7. Apply Framer Motion fade-ins to major layout components and stagger timeline children.
8. Add empty states and loading skeletons.
9. Add 'POSISI SEKARANG' badge on the latest timeline event using Secondary color.
